title: Hiring Store Manager at Amazon Books India

jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at Amazon Books India
jsonLd.description:
Amazon Books India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Bhubaneswar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Amazon Books India:
Amazon Books India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amazon Books India!
